content.title: AI-Assisted Sprint Planning

userStory.iWant: AI to suggest an optimal sprint backlog based on team capacity and priorities
userStory.soThat: sprint planning takes 30 minutes instead of 3 hours

acceptanceCriteria.then: the system proposes a sprint backlog respecting capacity, skills, and priority scores
the forecast updates in real-time showing impact on delivery date

implementationDetails: Capacity calculator accounting for PTO, meeting load, and historical velocity
Constraint satisfaction algorithm for assignment optimization
Real-time forecast recalculation using Monte Carlo simulation
